overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player navigating through a dystopian urban environment. The player walks through a damaged industrial area, ascends stairs and a ladder, and traverses an elevated walkway toward a large spherical structure under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: damaged industrial ground level with debris and shipping containers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the floating industrial structure

entered.detail: large red geodesic dome structure dominating the skyline
massive boxy industrial structure hovering above the ground
stacked metal containers with weathered paint
tall cranes visible against the skyline near damaged buildings

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a dirt path through a damaged industrial area under a clear blue sky. A massive floating building looms ahead while a distinctive spherical metal structure rises in the distance. Shipping containers and debris line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded area underneath the floating industrial building

events.description: moves underneath the floating industrial building into shadow

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive floating structure toward a metal staircase

entered.detail: elevated metal walkway with teal railings leading upward
large blue container with rust marks sitting under the structure

segments.scene_description: The player moves into the shadow of the floating industrial building, approaching a metal ramp with teal railings. The environment becomes more enclosed as the massive structure looms overhead, blocking portions of the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial stairwell with teal safety railings

events.description: begins ascending metal staircase with teal railings
passes through metal doorway into enclosed stairwell

agents.ego_description: climbing the metal stairs toward an upper level door

entered.detail: white industrial door with horizontal vents at the top of the stairs
vertical yellow metal ladder attached to the building wall
weathered concrete walls with graffiti and pipes

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the metal staircase with teal railings, moving through a narrow passage between concrete walls. At the top of the stairs, a white metal door and a yellow vertical ladder become visible against the industrial facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical ladder ascent on industrial wall

agents.ego_description: climbing the yellow ladder up the side of the industrial building

entered.detail: large rusted pipes running vertically along the wall
smooth gray industrial wall with mounting brackets

segments.scene_description: The player climbs the yellow ladder affixed to the industrial wall, with large pipes visible to the left. The view is dominated by the ladder rungs and the gray metal wall until reaching the top where sunlight becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway with panoramic city vista

events.description: emerges onto rooftop platform with bright sunlight and city views
continues walking across elevated bridge toward spherical structure

agents.ego_description: traversing the elevated metal walkway toward the large spherical structure

entered.detail: metal grated bridge with teal railings extending toward the sphere
large digital billboard displaying BARGHEST text and imagery
multi-level cylindrical building with yellow facade and balconies
tall glass and steel towers with neon accents in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto a sunlit rooftop walkway with a panoramic view of the futuristic cityscape. The path leads forward toward the massive spherical structure, with a yellow cylindrical building on the left and a large holographic billboard on the right. The player continues across the elevated metal bridge toward the sphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a debris-strewn industrial ground level up to a panoramic rooftop overlooking a futuristic cityscape. It begins on a dirt path lined with shipping containers under a clear blue sky, moving toward a massive floating building and a distant spherical metal structure. As the camera enters the shadow of the floating edifice, the environment becomes enclosed, leading the viewer up a metal staircase with teal railings and through a narrow concrete passage. The perspective then shifts upward as the camera climbs a yellow ladder against a gray metal wall, ascending past large pipes until the sunlight breaks through at the top. Finally, the scene opens onto a sunlit rooftop walkway, gliding across an elevated metal bridge past a yellow cylindrical building and a holographic billboard toward the looming spherical structure.
